objects.name: Customer
objects.description: A buyer account that places orders, holds a credit limit and tier, and is the master record in Salesforce CRM.
objects.descriptionZh: 下单的买方账户，持有信用额度与等级，是 Salesforce CRM 中的主数据记录。

attributes.name: tier
attributes.description: Customer.tier governs credit and fulfillment terms (R-04, R-08, R-15).

attributes.name: credit_limit
attributes.description: Default $10,000 Standard; up to $250,000 Enterprise (R-02, R-08).

sources.snippet: ### 3.1 Customer (对象: Customer) — system: Salesforce CRM (master), ERP (credit)

objects.name: Order
objects.description: A customer purchase captured by the OMS, progressing through Pending, Confirmed, Fulfilled, Closed or Cancelled.
objects.descriptionZh: 由 OMS 捕获的客户购买，状态依次为待处理、已确认、已履约、已关闭或已取消。

sources.snippet: ### 3.2 Order (对象: Order) — system: OMS

objects.name: LineItem
objects.description: A single product line on an order, with quantity and unit price; one per ordered item.
objects.descriptionZh: 订单上的单个产品行项，含数量与单价；每个订购商品一条。

sources.snippet: ### 3.3 LineItem (对象: LineItem) — system: OMS

objects.name: Product
objects.description: A catalog item identified by SKU, with backorderable and final-sale flags that govern allocation and returns.
objects.descriptionZh: 以 SKU 标识的目录商品，含可缺货补单与最终特卖标志，影响分配与退货。

sources.snippet: ### 3.4 Product (对象: Product) — system: prod-postgres-01.public.products

objects.name: Inventory
objects.description: On-hand and reserved stock for a product at a warehouse, held in ERP (NetSuite).
objects.descriptionZh: 产品在某仓库的现有与已预留库存，存于 ERP（NetSuite）。

sources.snippet: ### 3.5 Inventory (对象: Inventory) — system: ERP (NetSuite)

objects.name: Invoice
objects.description: A billing document for an order, issued in ERP (NetSuite), tracking amount due, due date and aging.
objects.descriptionZh: 针对订单的开票文档，在 ERP（NetSuite）签发，记录应付金额、到期日与账龄。

sources.snippet: ### 3.6 Invoice (对象: Invoice) — system: ERP (NetSuite)

objects.name: Payment
objects.description: A Stripe capture or refund settling an invoice, with authorized/settled/refunded status.
objects.descriptionZh: 通过 Stripe 进行的扣款或退款，用于结清发票，含已授权/已结算/已退款状态。

sources.snippet: ### 3.7 Payment (对象: Payment) — system: Stripe

objects.name: Shipment
objects.description: A carrier shipment for an order handled by ShipStation/3PL, tracking pick, transit and delivery.
objects.descriptionZh: 由 ShipStation/3PL 处理的订单承运发货，记录拣货、在途与送达。

sources.snippet: ### 3.8 Shipment (对象: Shipment) — system: ShipStation / 3PL

objects.name: Return
objects.description: A customer return against a delivered line item, progressing Requested, Approved, Received, Closed with an RMA.
objects.descriptionZh: 针对已送达行项的客户退货，状态依次为请求、批准、收货、关闭，并带有 RMA。

sources.snippet: ### 3.9 Return (对象: Return) — system: OMS Returns / prod-postgres-01

objects.name: CreditHold
objects.description: An OMS hold that freezes an order when a credit rule (R-03 or R-08) is violated, until reviewed.
objects.descriptionZh: 当违反信用规则（R-03 或 R-08）时由 OMS 冻结订单的记录，待审查解除。

sources.snippet: ### 3.10 CreditHold (对象: CreditHold) — system: OMS

relationships.name: places
relationships.description: A customer places one or more orders.

sources.snippet: consumes a cart of `Product` selections and the authenticated `Customer`; produces one `Order` (status `Pending`)

relationships.name: contains
relationships.description: An order contains one line item per ordered product.

sources.snippet: produces one `Order` (status `Pending`) with its child `LineItem` records and a calculated order total.

relationships.name: references
relationships.description: Each line item references one product from the catalog.

sources.snippet: | `productId`   | UUID         | FK → Product   |

relationships.name: tracks
relationships.description: Inventory tracks on-hand and reserved quantity per product.

sources.snippet: | `productId`    | UUID    | FK → Product |

relationships.name: billed_by
relationships.description: An order is billed by one or more invoices.

sources.snippet: | `orderId`     | UUID         | FK → Order     |

relationships.name: shipped_by
relationships.description: An order is fulfilled by one or more shipments.

sources.snippet: | `orderId`       | UUID      | FK → Order   |

relationships.name: settled_by
relationships.description: An invoice is settled by one or more payments (captures or refunds).

sources.snippet: | `invoiceId`    | UUID         | FK → Invoice   |

relationships.name: against
relationships.description: A return is raised against an original ordered line item.

sources.snippet: produces a `Return` record (status `Requested`) referencing the original `LineItem`(s).

relationships.name: freezes
relationships.description: A credit hold freezes the order it cites.

sources.snippet: produces a `CreditHold` record citing the violated rule (R-03 or R-08) and freezes the `Order`.

relationships.name: subject_to
relationships.description: A customer may be subject to one or more credit holds.

sources.snippet: | `customerId`   | UUID      | FK → Customer|

relationships.name: owes
relationships.description: A customer owes the open balance across their invoices, evaluated for credit (R-03, R-08).

sources.snippet: A `Customer` may not place an `Order` if any of their `Invoice` records are overdue by 60 or more days.

rules.title: Order references one Active Customer
rules.titleZh: 订单引用一个有效客户

statement.en: Every order must reference exactly one customer whose credit status is Active at the time of order placement.
statement.zh: 每个订单在下单时必须引用且仅引用一个信用状态为有效的客户。

sources.snippet: Every `Order` must reference exactly one `Customer` whose `creditStatus` is Active at the time of order placement.

statement.en: A customer is required to have an assigned credit limit before any order may be confirmed.
statement.zh: 在任何订单可被确认之前，客户必须已分配信用额度。

sources.snippet: A `Customer` is required to have an assigned `creditLimit` before any `Order` may be confirmed.

rules.title: Block order on 60+ day overdue invoice
rules.titleZh: 逾期60天以上发票阻止下单

statement.en: A customer may not place an order if any of their invoice records are overdue by 60 or more days.
statement.zh: 若客户有任何发票逾期达 60 天或以上，则该客户不得下单。

trigger.description: On credit screen at order placement

sources.snippet: A `Customer` may not place an `Order` if any of their `Invoice` records are overdue by 60 or more days.

rules.title: Fulfill only after payment in full

statement.en: An order may only be fulfilled after its payment is received in full, unless the customer's tier is Enterprise, in which case the order is fulfilled on net-30 invoice terms.
statement.zh: 订单仅在其付款全额收讫后方可履约；企业等级客户除外，此时按净30天发票账期履约。

sources.snippet: An `Order` may only be Fulfilled after its `Payment` is received in full, unless the `Customer`'s tier is Enterprise, in which case the `Order` is fulfilled on net-30 invoice terms.

rules.title: No fulfillment under active credit hold
rules.titleZh: 信用冻结期间不得履约

statement.en: An order shall not be marked Fulfilled while an active credit hold exists against it.
statement.zh: 当订单存在有效信用冻结时，不得将其标记为已履约。

rules.formal: CreditHold.status = Open ∧ CreditHold.order = Order ⇒ Order.status ≠ Fulfilled

sources.snippet: An `Order` shall not be marked Fulfilled while an active `CreditHold` exists against it.

statement.en: A return must be initiated within 30 days of the shipment delivery date for a full refund; after 30 days, the customer may receive store credit only.
statement.zh: 退货必须在发货送达日期起 30 天内发起方可全额退款；超过 30 天，客户仅可获得店内信用。

sources.snippet: A `Return` must be initiated within 30 days of the `Shipment` delivery date for a full refund; after 30 days, the `Customer` may receive store credit only.

rules.title: Final-sale products not returnable
rules.titleZh: 最终特卖产品不可退货

statement.en: A product marked final-sale may not be returned under any circumstances.
statement.zh: 标记为最终特卖的产品在任何情况下均不可退货。

sources.snippet: A `Product` marked final-sale may not be returned under any circumstances.

rules.title: No confirm over credit limit (non-Enterprise)
rules.titleZh: 超信用额度不得确认（非企业）

statement.en: An order may not be confirmed if its total would cause the customer's open balance to exceed their assigned credit limit, unless the customer's tier is Enterprise.
statement.zh: 若订单总额将导致客户未结余额超过其分配的信用额度，则不得确认该订单；企业等级客户除外。

trigger.description: On credit screen at order placement

sources.snippet: An `Order` may not be confirmed if its total would cause the `Customer`'s open balance to exceed their assigned `creditLimit`, unless the `Customer`'s tier is Enterprise.

rules.title: Allocation requires stock unless backorderable
rules.titleZh: 分配须有库存或可缺货补单

statement.en: A line item may not be allocated against inventory unless on-hand quantity covers the ordered quantity, unless the referenced product is flagged backorderable.
statement.zh: 除非现有数量足以覆盖订购数量，否则行项不得对库存进行分配；所引用产品被标记为可缺货补单的除外。

sources.snippet: A `LineItem` may not be allocated against `Inventory` unless on-hand quantity covers the ordered quantity, unless the referenced `Product` is flagged backorderable.

rules.title: Director approval for orders >= $50,000
rules.titleZh: 5万美元以上订单须总监批准

statement.en: An order total of $50,000 or more is required to receive Operations Director approval before it is released to fulfillment.
statement.zh: 订单总额达到 5 万美元或以上的，须在放行至履约前获得运营总监批准。

sources.snippet: An `Order` total of `$50,000` or more is required to receive Operations Director approval before it is released to fulfillment.

rules.title: International shipping to approved countries only
rules.titleZh: 国际发货仅限批准国家

statement.en: A shipment may not be dispatched to an international destination unless the destination country is on the approved-ship-to list.
statement.zh: 除非目的国位于批准的可发货国家清单上，否则发货不得发往国际目的地。

sources.snippet: A `Shipment` may not be dispatched to an international destination unless the destination country is on the approved-ship-to list.

rules.title: Finance Manager approval for refunds > $2,000
rules.titleZh: 超2000美元退款须财务经理批准

statement.en: A refund payment exceeding $2,000 is required to have Finance Manager approval before it is issued.
statement.zh: 退款金额超过 2,000 美元的，须在发放前获得财务经理批准。

sources.snippet: A refund `Payment` exceeding `$2,000` is required to have Finance Manager approval before it is issued.

rules.title: Credit hold override requires Credit Manager + reason
rules.titleZh: 信用冻结解除须信用经理及理由

statement.en: An active credit hold may not be overridden except by a Credit Manager or higher, and the override must record a written reason.
statement.zh: 有效的信用冻结只能由信用经理或更高级别人员解除，且解除必须记录书面理由。

sources.snippet: An active `CreditHold` may not be overridden except by a Credit Manager or higher, and the override must record a written reason.

rules.title: Return approval requires Delivered shipment
rules.titleZh: 退货批准须发货已送达

statement.en: A return may not be approved unless it references a line item on an order whose shipment status is Delivered.
statement.zh: 除非退货引用的行项所属订单的发货状态为已送达，否则不得批准该退货。

sources.snippet: A `Return` may not be approved unless it references a `LineItem` on an `Order` whose `Shipment` status is Delivered.

rules.title: Enterprise tier requires signed agreement + Finance approval
rules.titleZh: 企业等级须主协议及财务批准

statement.en: A customer may be assigned Enterprise tier only after a signed master agreement is on file and Finance approval is recorded.
statement.zh: 只有在已存档签署的主协议并记录财务批准后，客户方可被分配企业等级。

sources.snippet: A `Customer` may be assigned Enterprise tier only after a signed master agreement is on file and Finance approval is recorded.

statement.en: A return for a defective product may be initiated within 90 days of the delivery date regardless of the standard 30-day window.
statement.zh: 缺陷产品的退货可在送达日期起 90 天内发起，不受标准 30 天窗口限制。

sources.snippet: A `Return` for a defective `Product` may be initiated within 90 days of the delivery date regardless of the standard 30-day window.

rules.title: Inactive 24 months sets credit status Dormant

statement.en: A customer whose account has been inactive for 24 months shall have their credit status set to Dormant, after which new order placement requires re-verification.
statement.zh: 账户停用满 24 个月的客户，其信用状态应设为休眠；此后新下单需重新核验。

trigger.description: On 24 months inactivity / before order placement

sources.snippet: A `Customer` whose account has been inactive for 24 months shall have their `creditStatus` set to Dormant, after which new `Order` placement requires re-verification.

rules.title: Store credit expires 12 months after issue
rules.titleZh: 店内信用发放后12个月过期

statement.en: Store credit issued in lieu of a refund shall expire 12 months after the date of issue.
statement.zh: 代替退款发放的店内信用应在发放之日起 12 个月后过期。

sources.snippet: Store credit issued in lieu of a refund shall expire 12 months after the date of issue.

ruleGroups.rationale: Rules validating that an order references a valid, credit-enabled customer before confirmation.
Credit screening, hold placement/override authority, and dormancy that gate order placement and confirmation.
Rules that gate payment-before-fulfillment, allocation against stock, and dispatch.
Windows, final-sale, delivered-state and store-credit expiry governing returns and refunds.
Approval-authority-matrix thresholds requiring Director / Finance Manager / Finance sign-off.

actions.name: RegisterCustomer
actions.description: Create a new Customer record from a submitted profile with default Standard tier and Active credit status.
actions.descriptionZh: 根据提交的资料创建新客户记录，默认标准等级与有效信用状态。

inputs.name: profile
inputs.description: Submitted profile: legal name, billing address, channel, requested tier.

text.en: Capture submitted customer profile.
text.zh: 捕获提交的客户资料。

text.en: Create Customer with tier = Standard and creditStatus = Active.
text.zh: 创建客户，等级=标准，信用状态=有效。

sideEffects.description: Insert Customer record in Salesforce CRM.

profile.description: Submitted customer profile (legal name, billing address, channel, requested tier).

agent.toolDescription: Create a new Customer record with default Standard tier and Active credit status.

sources.snippet: `RegisterCustomer` — consumes the customer's submitted profile (legal name, billing address, channel, requested tier); produces a new `Customer` record with `tier = Standard` and `creditStatus = Active`.

actions.name: AssignCreditLimit
actions.description: Set a customer's credit limit and confirm tier from a credit assessment.
actions.descriptionZh: 依据信用评估设定客户信用额度并确认等级。

text.en: Read CustomerCreated and credit assessment.
text.zh: 读取客户已创建事件与信用评估。

text.en: Set creditLimit (default $10,000 Standard; up to $250,000 Enterprise) and confirm tier.
text.zh: 设定信用额度（标准默认1万美元；企业最高25万美元）并确认等级。

agent.toolDescription: Assign credit limit and confirm tier for a customer.

sources.snippet: `AssignCreditLimit` — consumes the `CustomerCreated` event and a credit assessment; produces an updated `Customer` with `creditLimit` set (default `$10,000` for Standard; up to `$250,000` for Enterprise) and `tier` confirmed.

actions.name: PlaceOrder
actions.description: Capture a cart of products for an authenticated customer into a Pending order with line items and a calculated total.
actions.descriptionZh: 将已认证客户的购物车捕获为待处理订单，含行项与计算总额。

text.en: Validate the order references one Active customer.
text.zh: 校验订单引用一个有效客户。

text.en: Create Order (status Pending) with child LineItem records.
text.zh: 创建待处理订单及其子行项记录。

text.en: Calculate order total from line items.
text.zh: 根据行项计算订单总额。

sideEffects.description: Insert Order and LineItem records in OMS.

agent.toolDescription: Capture a customer cart into a new Pending order with line items.

sources.snippet: `PlaceOrder` — consumes a cart of `Product` selections and the authenticated `Customer`; produces one `Order` (status `Pending`) with its child `LineItem` records and a calculated order total.

actions.name: ScreenOrderForCredit
actions.description: Check invoice aging and available credit; either authorize payment and draft an invoice, or place a credit hold.
actions.descriptionZh: 检查发票账龄与可用信用；要么授权付款并起草发票，要么放置信用冻结。

text.en: Check outstanding Invoice aging for 60+ day overdue.
text.zh: 检查未结发票是否逾期60天以上。

text.en: Check available credit against assigned credit limit.
text.zh: 对照分配的信用额度检查可用信用。

text.en: On pass: authorize Payment and create draft Invoice. On fail: create CreditHold.
text.zh: 通过则授权付款并创建草稿发票；不通过则创建信用冻结。

sideEffects.description: Create draft Invoice in ERP or CreditHold in OMS.

agent.toolDescription: Screen an order for credit: authorize payment + draft invoice, or place a credit hold.

sources.snippet: `ScreenOrderForCredit` — consumes the `OrderPlaced` event and the `Customer` credit profile; checks outstanding `Invoice` aging and available credit. Produces either a captured/authorized `Payment` and a draft `Invoice`, **or** a `CreditHold` record if the rules below are violated.

actions.name: AllocateInventory
actions.description: Reserve inventory against the order's line items and set the order to Confirmed.
actions.descriptionZh: 针对订单行项预留库存并将订单置为已确认。

text.en: Verify on-hand inventory covers ordered quantity unless backorderable.
text.zh: 核验现有库存覆盖订购数量，除非可缺货补单。

text.en: Increase Inventory.reservedQty and set Order.status = Confirmed.
text.zh: 增加库存预留数量并将订单状态置为已确认。

agent.toolDescription: Reserve inventory for an order's line items and confirm the order.

sources.snippet: `AllocateInventory` — consumes the `PaymentAuthorized` event and the `Order`'s `LineItem` list; produces a reservation against `Inventory` (`reservedQty` increased) and sets `Order.status = Confirmed`.

actions.name: CreateShipment
actions.description: Create a Shipment in Picking status with a packing list and carrier assignment for a confirmed order.
actions.descriptionZh: 为已确认订单创建拣货状态的发货，含装箱单与承运商分配。

text.en: Confirm no active credit hold and international destination is approved.
text.zh: 确认无有效信用冻结且国际目的地已获批准。

text.en: Create Shipment (status Picking) with packing list and carrier.
text.zh: 创建拣货状态发货，含装箱单与承运商。

agent.toolDescription: Create a pick-pack shipment with packing list and carrier assignment.

sources.snippet: `CreateShipment` — consumes the `InventoryReserved` event and the `Confirmed` `Order`; produces a `Shipment` record (status `Picking`) with a packing list and a carrier assignment.

actions.name: DispatchShipment
actions.description: Produce a tracking number and set shipment In Transit and order Fulfilled.
actions.descriptionZh: 生成追踪号，并将发货置为在途、订单置为已履约。

text.en: Ensure no active credit hold before marking Fulfilled.
text.zh: 标记为已履约前确保无有效信用冻结。

text.en: Assign tracking number; set Shipment.status = In Transit and Order.status = Fulfilled.
text.zh: 分配追踪号；将发货置为在途、订单置为已履约。

agent.toolDescription: Dispatch a shipment, set tracking, mark order Fulfilled.

sources.snippet: `DispatchShipment` — consumes the `ShipmentCreated` event; produces a tracking number, sets `Shipment.status = In Transit` and `Order.status = Fulfilled`.

actions.name: ConfirmDelivery
actions.description: Set shipment Delivered and record a deliveredAt timestamp from the carrier webhook.
actions.descriptionZh: 依据承运商回调将发货置为已送达并记录送达时间。

text.en: Consume carrier delivery webhook.
text.zh: 接收承运商送达回调。

text.en: Set Shipment.status = Delivered and record deliveredAt (starts 30-day return clock).
text.zh: 将发货置为已送达并记录送达时间（启动30天退货计时）。

agent.toolDescription: Confirm delivery and record the deliveredAt timestamp.

sources.snippet: `ConfirmDelivery` — consumes the carrier delivery webhook; produces `Shipment.status = Delivered` and a `deliveredAt` timestamp (this timestamp starts the 30-day return clock per Rule R-06).

actions.name: SettleInvoice
actions.description: Finalize the draft invoice and record the matched payment (up-front for Standard, net-30 for Enterprise).
actions.descriptionZh: 完结草稿发票并记录匹配付款（标准客户预付，企业客户净30天）。

text.en: Finalize Invoice (status Issued).
text.zh: 完结发票（状态：已开具）。

text.en: Record matched Payment; on settlement set Invoice.status = Paid.
text.zh: 记录匹配付款；结算后将发票置为已付。

agent.toolDescription: Finalize an invoice and record the matched payment.

sources.snippet: `SettleInvoice` — consumes the `OrderFulfilled` event and the draft `Invoice`; finalizes the `Invoice` (status `Issued` → `Paid`) and records the matched `Payment`.

actions.name: CloseOrder
actions.description: Reconcile settled payment and delivery to set the order Closed.
actions.descriptionZh: 对账已结算付款与送达，将订单置为已关闭。

text.en: Reconcile PaymentSettled and OrderDelivered.
text.zh: 对账付款已结算与订单已送达。

text.en: Set Order.status = Closed.
text.zh: 将订单状态置为已关闭。

agent.toolDescription: Close an order after payment settlement and delivery.

sources.snippet: `CloseOrder` — consumes the `PaymentSettled` and `OrderDelivered` events; produces `Order.status = Closed`.

actions.name: InitiateReturn
actions.description: Create a Requested return against a delivered order's line items, checking eligibility windows and final-sale.
actions.descriptionZh: 针对已送达订单行项创建请求状态退货，校验资格窗口与最终特卖。

text.en: Check return window (30 days, or 90 for defective) vs deliveredAt.
text.zh: 对照送达时间检查退货窗口（30天，缺陷90天）。

text.en: Reject final-sale products.
text.zh: 拒绝最终特卖产品。

text.en: Create Return (status Requested) referencing original LineItem(s).
text.zh: 创建请求状态退货，引用原始行项。

sideEffects.description: Insert Return record (Requested) in OMS Returns.

agent.toolDescription: Initiate a customer return against a delivered order.

sources.snippet: `InitiateReturn` — consumes the `Customer`'s request against a delivered `Order`; produces a `Return` record (status `Requested`) referencing the original `LineItem`(s).

actions.name: AuthorizeReturn
actions.description: Validate eligibility and issue an RMA number on an approved return.
actions.descriptionZh: 校验资格并在批准的退货上签发RMA编号。

text.en: Validate the shipment status is Delivered.
text.zh: 校验发货状态为已送达。

text.en: Set Return.status = Approved and issue RMA number.
text.zh: 将退货置为已批准并签发RMA编号。

agent.toolDescription: Authorize a return and issue an RMA number.

sources.snippet: `AuthorizeReturn` — consumes the `ReturnInitiated` event; validates eligibility windows and produces an RMA (Return Merchandise Authorization) number on the `Return`.

actions.name: ReceiveReturn
actions.description: Inspect inbound returned goods against the RMA and restock sellable inventory.
actions.descriptionZh: 依据RMA检验入库退货商品，并将可售商品回补库存。

text.en: Receive inbound shipment against the RMA and inspect.
text.zh: 依据RMA接收入库发货并检验。

text.en: If sellable, increment Inventory.onHandQty and set Return.status = Received.
text.zh: 若可售，增加现有库存并将退货置为已收货。

agent.toolDescription: Receive and inspect returned goods, restock if sellable.

sources.snippet: `ReceiveReturn` — consumes the inbound `Shipment` against the RMA; produces an inspection result and, if the goods are sellable, increments `Inventory.onHandQty`.

actions.name: IssueRefund
actions.description: Issue a refund payment within window or a store-credit adjustment outside window, plus a credit memo, closing the return.
actions.descriptionZh: 窗口内发放退款，窗口外发放店内信用调整，并出具贷项通知单，关闭退货。

text.en: Require Finance Manager approval for refunds over $2,000.
text.zh: 超过2000美元的退款须财务经理批准。

text.en: Within window: create Payment refund. Outside window: adjust Customer store credit.
text.zh: 窗口内创建退款；窗口外调整客户店内信用。

text.en: Post credit memo against Invoice and set Return.status = Closed.
text.zh: 对发票出具贷项通知单并将退货置为已关闭。

sideEffects.description: Issue refund via Stripe or adjust store credit.
Credit memo against Invoice in ERP.

agent.toolDescription: Issue a refund or store credit and post a credit memo.

sources.snippet: `IssueRefund` — consumes the `ReturnReceived` event; produces either a `Payment` refund (within window) or a store-credit adjustment on the `Customer` (outside window), plus a credit memo against the `Invoice`.

actions.name: PlaceCreditHold
actions.description: Create a CreditHold citing the violated rule and freeze the order following a failed credit screen.
actions.descriptionZh: 依据信用筛查失败创建引用违规规则的信用冻结并冻结订单。

text.en: Consume failed credit screen result.
text.zh: 接收信用筛查失败结果。

text.en: Create CreditHold citing R-03 or R-08 and freeze the Order.
text.zh: 创建引用R-03或R-08的信用冻结并冻结订单。

sideEffects.description: Insert CreditHold (Open) in OMS; freeze Order.

agent.toolDescription: Place a credit hold on an order citing the violated rule.

sources.snippet: `PlaceCreditHold` — consumes a failed credit screen; produces a `CreditHold` record citing the violated rule (R-03 or R-08) and freezes the `Order`.

actions.name: ResolveCreditHold
actions.description: Credit Manager records overdue payment and releases the order, or cancels it, overriding the hold with a recorded reason.
actions.descriptionZh: 信用经理记录逾期付款并放行订单，或取消订单，并以记录理由解除冻结。

text.en: Verify override authority (Credit Manager or above) and record reason.
text.zh: 核验解除权限（信用经理及以上）并记录理由。

text.en: Record overdue Invoice payment and release Order, or cancel Order.
text.zh: 记录逾期发票付款并放行订单，或取消订单。

agent.toolDescription: Resolve a credit hold by releasing or cancelling the order with a recorded reason.

sources.snippet: `ResolveCreditHold` — consumes the `CreditHoldOpened` event; the Credit Manager either records payment of the overdue `Invoice` and releases the `Order`, or cancels the `Order`.

events.name: customer.signup.submitted
events.description: A prospective customer submitted a signup profile.
events.descriptionZh: 潜在客户已提交注册资料。

sources.snippet: Triggered by event **CustomerSignupSubmitted**; emits event **CustomerCreated**.

events.name: customer.created
events.description: A new Customer record was created.
events.descriptionZh: 新客户记录已创建。

sources.snippet: | **CustomerCreated**   | Salesforce      | ERP                 | `AssignCreditLimit` (Step 2.2)            |

events.name: credit.limit.assigned
events.description: A customer's credit limit and tier were assigned.
events.descriptionZh: 客户的信用额度与等级已分配。

sources.snippet: Triggered by **CustomerCreated**; emits **CreditLimitAssigned**.

events.name: checkout.submitted
events.description: A customer submitted checkout for a cart.
events.descriptionZh: 客户已提交购物车结账。

sources.snippet: Triggered by **CheckoutSubmitted**; emits **OrderPlaced**.

events.name: order.placed
events.description: An order was placed in Pending status.
events.descriptionZh: 订单已以待处理状态下达。

sources.snippet: | **OrderPlaced**       | OMS             | OMS credit gate, ERP| `ScreenOrderForCredit` (Step 3.2)         |

events.name: payment.authorized
events.description: Payment was authorized/captured following a passed credit screen.
events.descriptionZh: 信用筛查通过后付款已授权/扣款。

sources.snippet: | **PaymentAuthorized** | Stripe          | OMS                 | `AllocateInventory` (Step 3.3)            |

events.name: credit.hold.placed
events.description: The credit screen failed and a hold is being raised.
events.descriptionZh: 信用筛查失败，正在触发冻结。

sources.snippet: | **CreditHoldPlaced**  | OMS credit gate | ERP, OMS            | `PlaceCreditHold` (Step 5.1)              |

events.name: credit.hold.opened
events.description: A CreditHold record was opened against an order.
events.descriptionZh: 已针对订单开立信用冻结记录。

sources.snippet: Triggered by **CreditHoldPlaced**; emits **CreditHoldOpened**.

events.name: credit.hold.released
events.description: A credit hold was overridden and the order released back to allocation.
events.descriptionZh: 信用冻结被解除，订单放行回到分配阶段。

sources.snippet: emits **CreditHoldReleased** (which re-enters Step 3.3) or **OrderCancelled**.

events.name: order.cancelled
events.description: An order was cancelled (e.g. unresolved credit hold).
events.descriptionZh: 订单已取消（例如信用冻结未解决）。

sources.snippet: emits **CreditHoldReleased** (which re-enters Step 3.3) or **OrderCancelled**.

events.name: inventory.reserved
events.description: Inventory was reserved and the order set to Confirmed.
events.descriptionZh: 库存已预留，订单置为已确认。

sources.snippet: | **InventoryReserved** | ERP             | OMS, ShipStation    | `CreateShipment` (Step 3.4)               |

events.name: backorder.raised
events.description: Stock was short and a backorder was raised during allocation.
events.descriptionZh: 分配时库存不足，触发缺货补单。

sources.snippet: emits **InventoryReserved**, or **BackorderRaised** if stock is short.

events.name: shipment.created
events.description: A shipment was created in Picking status.
events.descriptionZh: 已创建拣货状态的发货。

sources.snippet: Triggered by **InventoryReserved**; emits **ShipmentCreated**.

events.name: shipment.dispatched
events.description: A shipment was dispatched with a tracking number.
events.descriptionZh: 发货已发运并带有追踪号。

sources.snippet: | **ShipmentDispatched**| ShipStation     | OMS                 | `ConfirmDelivery` (Step 3.6)              |

events.name: order.fulfilled
events.description: An order was marked Fulfilled on dispatch.
events.descriptionZh: 发运时订单已标记为已履约。

sources.snippet: Triggered by **ShipmentCreated**; emits **OrderFulfilled** and **ShipmentDispatched**.

events.name: order.delivered
events.description: The shipment was delivered to the customer.
events.descriptionZh: 发货已送达客户。

sources.snippet: | **OrderDelivered**    | ShipStation     | OMS, ERP            | `SettleInvoice` / `CloseOrder` (Step 3.7) |

events.name: invoice.issued
events.description: An invoice was finalized and issued.
events.descriptionZh: 发票已完结并开具。

sources.snippet: | **InvoiceIssued**     | ERP             | Stripe, Customer    | dunning / `SettleInvoice` (Step 3.7)      |

events.name: payment.settled
events.description: Payment was settled against the invoice.
events.descriptionZh: 付款已对发票结算。

sources.snippet: | **PaymentSettled**    | Stripe          | ERP, OMS            | `CloseOrder` (Step 3.8)                   |

events.name: order.closed
events.description: The order was reconciled and closed.
events.descriptionZh: 订单已对账并关闭。

sources.snippet: Triggered by **PaymentSettled** + **OrderDelivered**; emits **OrderClosed**.

events.name: return.requested
events.description: A customer requested a return.
events.descriptionZh: 客户已请求退货。

sources.snippet: | **ReturnRequested**   | Storefront/CRM  | OMS Returns         | `InitiateReturn` (Step 4.1)               |

events.name: return.initiated
events.description: A Return record was created in Requested status.
events.descriptionZh: 已创建请求状态的退货记录。

sources.snippet: Triggered by **ReturnRequested** (customer action); emits **ReturnInitiated**.

events.name: return.authorized
events.description: A return was approved with an RMA number.
events.descriptionZh: 退货已批准并带有RMA编号。

sources.snippet: Triggered by **ReturnInitiated**; emits **ReturnAuthorized**.

events.name: return.received
events.description: Returned goods were received and inspected.
events.descriptionZh: 退货商品已收货并检验。

sources.snippet: | **ReturnReceived**    | OMS Returns     | ERP, Stripe         | `IssueRefund` (Step 4.4)                  |

events.name: refund.issued
events.description: A refund or store credit was issued and the return closed.
events.descriptionZh: 退款或店内信用已发放，退货已关闭。

sources.snippet: | **RefundIssued**      | Stripe          | ERP, Customer       | credit memo posting (Step 4.4)            |

processes.description: Create a customer account and assign a credit limit and tier.

sources.snippet: ## 2. Process: Customer Onboarding (客户开户)

processes.description: End-to-end flow from order capture through credit screening, allocation, fulfillment, invoicing and close.

sources.snippet: ## 3. Process: Order-to-Cash (订单到回款)

processes.description: From return initiation through authorization, receipt/restock, and refund or store-credit issuance.

triggers.description: Customer requests a return against a delivered order.

sources.snippet: ## 4. Process: Returns & Refunds (退货与退款)

processes.description: Detect and place a credit hold, then review and resolve by releasing the order back to allocation or cancelling it.

triggers.description: OMS credit gate places a hold after a failed screen.

sources.snippet: ## 5. Process: Credit Hold Review (信用冻结审查)

stageCritiques.objects: 10 entity object types extracted from §3 of the systems-and-data doc; all keys and enum vocabularies grounded in the attribute tables.
stageCritiques.rules: All 18 atomic rules R-01..R-18 mined sentence-by-sentence from the policy doc and clustered into 5 groups; severities mapped block/warn/info from modal verbs (may not/shall not -> block, full-refund window -> warn, expiry note -> info).
stageCritiques.actions: 16 actions cover onboarding (2), order-to-cash (8 + place-credit-hold), returns (4) and credit-hold resolve; each carries an AgentBinding tool and rule-gated steps.
stageCritiques.events: 24 events; system-table events extracted, intra-process handoffs inferred; producedBy/consumedBy maintained as the exact inverse of action emitsEvents/triggeredByEventIds.
stageCritiques.processes: 4 end-to-end processes chain the actions with event-driven edges; credit-hold release re-enters allocation per SOP §5.2.
